CHAIN-INIT-QP.summary: Recipient-side chain replication (Phase A.full, redesigned): follower lazy-bootstraps its local rdmamig_server (binds on server.rdma_migration_port if not already up) and replies with its RDMA port so the leader can rdmamig_client_connect to it. Must be called before CHAIN-PREP under the connect-then-register order required by the rdmamig API.
